summary: Closed S008 production remote-orphan governance as a proof gap: added focused API regression coverage for existing remote-orphan summary/blocker signals and reused existing stale remote cleanup persistence coverage without production behavior changes.
remaining_risks: Post-S008 final deliverability gate still needs to be rerun across API/CLI/Web and runtime/product checks.
Background process-manager integration remains an operator/deployment risk outside the repo-owned task-pull runtime scope.
